signals.raw:
South Korea Annual Inflation Rises to 2.2% in March 2026, Below Forecasts Amid Middle East Energy Shocks | NO | MED confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, but fell short of market expectations of 2.4%, as reported by Statistics Korea via Trading Economics; this marks the latest confirmed data point, with no newer releas
